visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short black hair wearing a denim bucket hat and a dark purple off-the-shoulder top is shown in a close-up, eating spicy red rice cakes from a pink bowl with blue chopsticks. She has an expressive, joyful face as she chews. Floating yellow and red text graphics are layered over her. (2) The scene cuts to a Costco warehouse aisle with high metal shelves stocked with various boxes and jars. The woman walks quickly toward the camera, then turns to point at a specific product on the shelf while looking surprised and excited. (3) She stands in front of the shelving unit holding a green and orange bag of Bibigo Tteokbokki. She points at the packaging, gestures toward the price tag, and then brings the bag closer to the lens to show the details of the product image. (4) Close-up shots show the woman's hands holding the product bag and pointing at the price label on the shelf, which reads $299. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a warehouse store. (5) Transition to a kitchen setting; a close-up of a frying pan on a stove shows the rice cakes being stirred in a thick, bubbling red sauce with a black spatula. (6) A finished plate of the rice cakes is shown in a pink bowl, now garnished with white sesame seeds. (7) The woman is now joined by another woman at a table; they are both eating and reacting positively with thumbs up and hand gestures. They display the internal packaging of the product, including a clear plastic bag of raw rice cakes and a sauce packet. The background is a brightly lit indoor living area.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 好辣. (2) [Subtitle]: 是什麼樣的年糕讓人意猶未盡. [Variety]: BBBB. (3) [Subtitle]: 新品必買超上癮. [Logo]: Bibigo. [Slogan]: 韓式辣炒年糕. (4) [Subtitle]: 這看起來超好吃的誒. (5) [Subtitle]: 他們做的韓式料理都很棒. (6) [Subtitle]: 像之前有介紹過他們的蝦餃. (7) [Subtitle]: 也是非常不錯. (8) [Subtitle]: 除了價格我比較沒有那麼喜歡. (9) [Subtitle]: 價價格的話那這一次多少錢. (10) [Subtitle]: 我來看一下. (11) [Subtitle]: 喔剩那麼少. (12) [Subtitle]: 一公斤只要299元. (13) [Subtitle]: 你可以吃滿滿的韓式辣炒年糕. (14) [Subtitle]: 來試試看值不值得Bibigo. (15) [Subtitle]: 喜歡韓式辣炒年糕的呢. (16) [Subtitle]: 你一定要買Bibigo的這一款回去試試看. (17) [Subtitle]: 它裡面有三袋有那麼大份的年糕以及一包粉. (18) [Subtitle]: 那你料理完以後就會變成這樣. (19) [Subtitle]: 整盤的辣炒年糕. (20) [Subtitle]: 最重要的是它的醬啊. [Variety]: 辣甜的 非常完美. (21) [Variety]: 很韓的味道. (22) [Subtitle]: 先甜後辣的那口感就整個很還原. (23) [Subtitle]: 果然韓式系列就是一定要選Bibigo. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後它的年糕也是非常的Q彈有味. (25) [Subtitle]: 所以我呢我們會回購這一款韓式辣炒年糕. (26) [Subtitle]: 那麼大盤100塊你覺得值得嗎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female creators appearing together in the final segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main character 1: Female with short black hair, denim bucket hat, dark purple ruffled top. Main character 2: Female with long black hair, brown off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a domestic setting, then shifts to the wide, high-ceilinged aisles of a Costco warehouse with orange and blue steel racking and pallet-sized inventory. It concludes in a cozy, brightly lit home interior with a wooden table and household decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, wet squelching chewing sound followed by an exaggerated slurp, immediately establishing a high-arousal food-centric theme. An upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM with a strong four-on-the-floor beat swells in the background. (2) A rapid sequence of percussive 'Beep' sounds, styled like a sensor or digital UI, occurs six times in quick succession. The BGM remains energetic with bright synthesizer stabs. (3) A female voice begins a high-pitched, enthusiastic narration in Mandarin. Her speech rate is fast and rhythmic, matched to the BGM tempo. A subtle 'Whoosh' transition SFX marks the scene shift. (4) A clear 'Ding' bell SFX cuts through the mix as a price or specific text appears. The BGM continues with a driving bassline. (5) A male voice, acting as a secondary narrator or internal thought, overlaps with a slightly lower pitch and confident tone. A 'Cash register' metallic ringing sound accompanies the price display. (6) A 'Pop' bubble SFX occurs as variety text graphics appear on screen. The female narrator’s voice remains bright and enunciated. (7) A low-frequency bubbling and sizzling sound of liquid cooking is introduced, briefly becoming the center of the acoustic field. The BGM ducks slightly to allow the foley sound to be heard. (8) A high-pitched 'Sparkle' chime SFX signals the presentation of the final dish. The BGM resumes full volume with a cheerful melody. (9) Multiple voices (two female, one male) engage in a fast-paced dialogue with overlapping laughter and positive exclamations like 'Mmm'. Frequent 'Whoosh' and 'Ding' SFX highlight the rapid editing cuts until the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly energetic and persuasive review of Bibigo's Korean rice cakes found at Costco. The video uses a social-media-native editing style to highlight the value for money, ease of preparation, and flavor profile to encourage viewers to purchase the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically identifies the brand 'Bibigo', shows the packaging clearly, mentions the price at Costco, and provides a direct recommendation to buy it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity social media marketing format featuring typical 'variety show' text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
